title: serapias nurrica
intro: Serapias nurrica, also known as the autumn lady's-tresses or the autumn serapias, is a rare and endangered species of orchid native to the Iberian Peninsula. This plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Serapias nurrica are attributed to its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and treat gastrointestinal problems. Herbal preparations of Serapias nurrica are typically made by drying the plant's roots and leaves, and can be consumed as tea or in capsule form, although its availability and use may be limited due to its rarity.
